traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: See in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: Advantage on INT, WIS, and CHA saves against magic.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Double proficiency on History checks about magic items and devices.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: Construct tiny clockwork devices with tinker's tools.
